examples: He presented Albert with a rat, and every time the baby reached out to touch it, Watson hit a steel bar with a hammer to produce a horrendous clang.
He described it as the most horrendous experience of his life.
Even so, the shock was horrendous.
Coroner Dewi Pritchard-Jones said Jade, who had been in the front seat, had suffered "horrendous" injuries.
Edith also told of the horrendous condition that his father and grandmother were subjected to.
